/usr/bin/c++ -DJENGA_DKDV_EXPERIMENT_BTRANS -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/ckProfiler.dir/profiler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ckProfiler.dir/profile_grouped_conv_fwd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ckProfiler.dir/profile_grouped_conv_bwd_data.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ckProfiler.dir/profile_grouped_conv_bwd_weight.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ckProfiler.dir/profile_layout_transform.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ckProfiler.dir/profile_grouped_conv_fwd_bias_relu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ckProfiler.dir/profile_grouped_conv_fwd_bias_add_relu.cpp.o -o ../../bin/ckProfiler  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/dtk/hip/lib: /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/11/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a ../../lib/libutility.a -ldevice_layout_transform_instance -ldevice_grouped_conv2d_fwd_gfx928_instance -ldevice_grouped_conv2d_bwd_gfx928_instance -ldevice_grouped_conv2d_wrw_gfx928_instance -ldevice_grouped_conv2d_fwd_gfx936_instance -ldevice_grouped_conv2d_bwd_gfx936_instance -ldevice_grouped_conv3d_bwd_gfx936_instance -ldevice_grouped_conv2d_wrw_gfx936_instance -ldevice_grouped_conv3d_wrw_gfx936_instance -ldevice_fused_conv2d_cba_gfx928_instance -ldevice_fused_conv2d_cbra_gfx928_instance -ldevice_fused_conv2d_cba_gfx936_instance -ldevice_fused_conv2d_cbra_gfx936_instance -ldevice_grouped_conv2d_fwd_bias_relu_gfx928_instance -ldevice_grouped_conv2d_fwd_bias_add_relu_gfx928_instance -ldevice_grouped_conv3d_fwd_gfx928_instance -ldevice_fused_conv2d_cba_gfx938_instance -ldevice_fused_conv2d_cbra_gfx938_instance /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/11/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a /opt/dtk/hip/lib/libgalaxyhip.so.5.2.26113.2065-6699a1f0 --hip-link --offload-arch=gfx936 -L"/opt/dtk/llvm/lib/clang/17.0.0/include/../lib/linux" -lclang_rt.builtins-x86_64
